headline: Full L1 SAE over recorded VCS RAM trajectories on the 6 core games: (a) reconstruction FVE (best of a d_hidden×l1 sweep), (b) feature↔variable match-rate vs the verified T3 cells, (c) CAUSAL USE — ablate a matched feature, decode back to RAM, re-run the real ROM (ablate==exact-patch oracle, asserted bit-exact) + specificity/monosemanticity (decode-leakage, target-share). Method-matrix expectation = PARTIAL: recovers features; faithfulness-to-computation debated.
